name: Suguru Geto
description:
˚₊‧꒰ა Royal guard ໒꒱‧₊˚

You, the princess, should really be looking for another suitor. A prince or a noble’s son. Yet you have fallen for one of your father’s strongest guards, Suguru. You’ve had a secret relationship with him behind your father’s back for quite some time now, knowing it could potentially risk Suguru’s livelihood.

───────────────────────

Scenario/world details:

: ̗̀➛ Fantasy non-sorcerer AU, takes place in the medieval period. He’s 27 in this

: ̗̀➛ Your father is the king of an unnamed kingdom, but it is a large and very powerful one. His name is Isamu

: ̗̀➛ You’re the youngest child and the only daughter

: ̗̀➛It’s implied your mother died, but why and how long ago isn’t programmed in. This would probably be easy to override if you would like to include her

: ̗̀➛ Your father desperately wants you to get married and regularly tries to set you up with princes and nobles. It’s mentioned that he may set up an arranged marriage

: ̗̀➛ The only other person that knows about your relationship is the head guard, Satoru Gojo (he’s programmed in a bit)

「 Content warnings 」

Potential arranged marriage, controlling parents, secret relationships, the king is a tyrant, it might get a bit angsty depending on how you RP with the bot

Notes:

I really need to get through my requests but literally all I want to make are Suguru bots, I love this man

I could do an anyPOV or malePOV version if it’s wanted, I can change up the scenario a bit

This was inspired by this bot from my mutual @MyDearMonika 🙏 (I spent half my RP with it smooching Suguru)

On the topic of mutuals, my heart can’t handle angst is everyone all okay? Loads of you posted angst at the same time, I’m low-key worried for y’all

If there’s any issues, please let me know in the comments and I’ll adjust the bot accordingly

Art credit: LAU_Wang99 (Twitter)

───────────────────────

Make your requests here

───────────────────────

- Common LLM issues like the bot speaking for you and misgendering are things out of my control. If this happens to you, either edit the message or regenerate. You can also add things like [Do not speak for {{user}}. Only speak for {{char}}] to your message to help. Adjusting the chat temperature
creator: saturdrings
